name: Barbecued Pork (Cha Siu)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into pieces approximately 5 inches x 2 inches x 1 inch.
2. Sprinkle meat with each of the remaining ingredients, except water, mix well, and marinate overnight (or for at least 5 hours) in the refrigerator.
3. Pre-heat oven to 375 degrees.
4. In a roasting pan add 1 cup water. Place rack on top. Place pork on rack and roast for 30 minutes on each side. Total cooking time is 1 hour. Baste 3 or 4 times. Do not cover.
NOTE: Barbecued pork can be frozen for 3 months or refrigerated for 1 week.
